description: Counselor L5 vocation-flow community-witnessed-competence record. G3 STRUCTURAL: counselorClass const 'community-witnessed-competent' (NOT clergy / NOT ordained / NOT state-licensed-psych / NOT clinical-psychiatrist / NOT ordained-pastoral-counselor). G14 STRUCTURAL: lLevel const L5 + employmentRelation const vocation-flow. ≥3 prior counselor attestations REQUIRED (witnessing chain; musubi G3 pattern shared; structurally distinct from clinical-psych credentialing).

counselorClass.description: G3 STRUCTURAL: const 'community-witnessed-competent'; clergy/ordained/state-licensed-psych/clinical-psychiatrist/ordained-pastoral-counselor DELIBERATELY excluded (Reformed 万人祭司 + iyashi N9 + chigiri G14 UPL-equivalent pattern shared)

lLevel.description: G14 STRUCTURAL: L5 vocation-flow per Liberation Ladder

employmentRelation.description: G14 STRUCTURAL: vocation-flow steward (NOT employee; NOT contractor; NOT clinical-psych-on-stipend)

witnessingCounselorAttestations.description: ≥3 prior counselor attestation CIDs witnessing community-witnessed competence (musubi G3 pattern shared; structurally distinct from clinical-psych credentialing)

councilAttestations.description: ≥3 Council Lv6+ DIDs attesting counselor classification

doctrinalTraditionSelfDeclared.description: Transparency declaration (NOT gatekeeping per G12 cross-doctrinal Wellbecoming; members can request matching tradition)
